Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a Python dict representing DECLARE model for scenario

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We must follow given format keys existence absence exactly one init responded existence coexistence response precedence succession altresponse altprecedence altsuccession chainresponse chainprecedence chainsuccession noncoexistence nonsuccession nonchainsuccession

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: It says value is a dictionary containing as keys the activities and as corresponding value the support 1 0 and confidence of the declarative rule So likely each activity maps to a dict with keys support and confidence

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to fill plausible constraints for each category

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to reason about process Idea Generation to Design Draft to Technical Feasibility Check to Cost Evaluation to Prototype Creation to Laboratory Testing to User Testing to Approval Gate to Marketing Plan to Final Launch

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can define existence constraints every activity that must appear at least once perhaps IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Absence maybe none

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Exactly one maybe IG must appear exactly once and FL exactly once

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Init activities that can start the case Idea Generation IG

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Responded existence if activity A occurs then later activity B must occur Eg after Idea Generation must have Design Draft After Design Draft must have Technical Feasibility Check and so on

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Coexistence activities that must appear together Eg Laboratory Testing and User Testing maybe both optional but if one appears the other appears

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Response similar to responded existence we will reuse the same mapping

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Precedence if B occurs then A must have occurred before

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Succession we set for each immediate pair in the main process

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Altresponse alternative response maybe if A occurs then either B or C must occur later

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Altprecedence if B occurs then either A or another prior activity must have happened

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Altsuccession if A occurs then either B or C must occur directly after

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Chainresponse we set a simple eventual link such as IG to FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Chainprecedence we set FL preceded by IG

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Chainsuccession we set the immediate ordered sequence IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Noncoexistence choices were unrealistic so we instead choose LT and UT as alternative and use them as noncoexistence

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Nonsuccession after Idea Generation you cannot directly go to Technical Feasibility Check and similar skipped step pairs

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Nonchainsuccession define reverse order restrictions such as MP to IG FL to IG and similar later activities not followed by earlier ones

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Given the task likely expects a plausible dict showing understanding we can provide a concise but filled dict and include all keys with dict values
